title: Bromsgrove Road Cutting
summary: Bromsgrove Road Cutting is a 0.2 hectares (0.49 acres) geological site of Special Scientific Interest in the West Midlands. The site was notified in 1990 under the Wildlife and Countryside Act 1981. It is located on the eastern edge of Halesowen.
